scope.description: Which characters to make audition videos for. 'all' (default) = every character that already has a turnaround sheet. 'characters' = only the ids listed in characterIds.

characterIds.description: Required when scope='characters': the character ids to generate audition videos for.

scenarioId.description: Optional target scenario id. If omitted (recommended), runs on the currently active scenario in the workbench.

force.description: If true, regenerate the audition video + voice sample even for characters that already have one. Default false (idempotent: skips characters that already have an audition video).
